creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
Attached is a modified version of the postfix25 shar submitted by Olli
Hauer.  All I did is modify files/patch-makedefs and add
files/patch-src::util::sys_defs.h.  Builds on 7.2-RELEASE.  I've
privately sent the build logs to miwi.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
